name: Paul C. Fischer Pro Shop
about: Paul C. Fischer Pro Shop is the golf facility located within the Philipsburg Elks Lodge & Country Club. The pro shop is managed by Paul Fischer, a golf professional with over 30 years of experience at the club. It operates as a full-service retail establishment offering equipment, apparel, and services, and serves as the central hub for all golf course operations, including tee time management and tournament coordination. The facility also offers golf lessons for beginners and intermediate players, with a focus on a simple and classic approach to the game.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-service pro shop managed by an experienced golf professional
On-site golf lessons available for beginners and intermediate golfers
Central hub for golf course operations including tee times and tournaments

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant available at the Philipsburg Elks Lodge & Country Club
On-site restaurant and bar available at the Philipsburg Elks Lodge & Country Club

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The pro shop offers club rentals and is fully stocked with equipment. You can also purchase new gear if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant and bar, so outside food and drink policies are not specified. It's recommended to check with the pro shop for details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time to complete 18 holes on the simulator or the course. This information may be available upon inquiry at the pro shop.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility appears to be family-friendly, offering golf lessons for juniors and a welcoming environment as part of a country club.
